description: Machine-checked registry of OpenHuman-level runtime evidence artifacts and registered diagnostic preflight sidecars. Each entry ties a critical Wiii runtime capability to an opt-in probe, contract tests, GitHub Actions workflow, artifact name, schema version, and live-run guard.
